notes: Patterns ported from the original Cashiro HDFCMutualFundParser.kt (parser-core/src/main/kotlin/com/ritesh/parser/core/bank/HDFCMutualFundParser.kt, extends BaseIndianBankParser — INR). The original parser handles SIP purchase and redemption confirmations: - canHandle: sender.uppercase().contains("HDFCMF") - isTransactionMessage: any of "sip purchase", "has been processed", "folio", "nav", "redemption" (positive checks only; no skip-list override) - amount: first `Rs\.?\s*([\d,]+\.?\d*)` match (case-sensitive in Kotlin) - merchant (the fund scheme name): `under\s+(.+?)\s+for` (ignore case) - type: "sip purchase" / "purchase" -> INVESTMENT, "redemption" -> INCOME - balance and accountLast4 are always null (MF SMS carry a folio number, not a bank account), so no extractors and no fallback are defined here. No original test file exists for this parser; fixtures below are synthesized from the parser's regexes and doc comments.

fixtures.name: sip purchase processed with scheme and folio
fixtures.body: Dear Investor, your SIP Purchase of Rs. 5,000.00 under HDFC Flexi Cap Fund - Direct Growth for Folio 12345678/90 has been processed at NAV of Rs. 1543.2510. -HDFCMF

fields.merchant: HDFC Flexi Cap Fund - Direct Growth

fixtures.name: lumpsum purchase confirmation
fixtures.body: Your purchase of Rs.10,000.00 under HDFC Top 100 Fund - Regular Plan for Folio 11223344/55 has been processed at NAV of Rs.95.4321 on 08-Jun-26.

fixtures.name: redemption processed with scheme is income
fixtures.body: Redemption of Rs. 25,000.00 under HDFC Liquid Fund - Direct Plan for Folio 98765432/11 has been processed. Proceeds will be sent to your registered bank.

fixtures.name: redemption without scheme phrase parses but needs review (null merchant in Kotlin)
fixtures.body: Redemption request of Rs. 12,345.67 in Folio 5566778/99 has been processed. Applicable NAV: Rs. 45.6789.

fixtures.name: otp message is filter-rejected
fixtures.body: Your OTP for HDFC Mutual Fund online request is 482913. Do not share it with anyone.
